languages.text: "Вы лишили нас Изимонда! Святая Терра, вы хоть представляете, чего мне стоило добиться, чтобы отец не только заметил этого низкородного выскочку, но и начал принимать его всерьез?"

traits.locale_text: "Вы лишили нас Изимонда! Святая Терра, вы хоть представляете, чего мне стоило добиться, чтобы отец не только заметил этого низкородного выскочку, но и начал принимать его всерьез?"

languages.text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"
languages.original_text: "Вы лишили нас Изимонда! Святая Терра, вы хоть представляете, чего мне стоило добиться, чтобы отец не только заметил этого низкородного выскочку, но и начал принимать его всерьез?"

traits.locale_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"
"You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"
"You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

languages.text: “你害我们失去了伊西蒙德！神圣泰拉在上，你知不知道，我花了多少心血，才让我父亲注意到那个出身低贱的暴发户，甚至开始认真对待他？”
languages.original_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

traits.locale_text: “你害我们失去了伊西蒙德！神圣泰拉在上，你知不知道，我花了多少心血，才让我父亲注意到那个出身低贱的暴发户，甚至开始认真对待他？”

languages.text: « Vous nous avez coûté Isimond ! Par la Sainte Terra, avez-vous la moindre idée des efforts que j'ai dû déployer pour que mon père remarque cet opportuniste de basse condition et, plus difficile encore, pour qu'il le prenne au sérieux ? »
languages.original_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous nous avez coûté Isimond ! Par la Sainte Terra, avez-vous la moindre idée des efforts que j'ai dû déployer pour que mon père remarque cet opportuniste de basse condition et, plus difficile encore, pour qu'il le prenne au sérieux ? »

languages.text: "Bize İsimond'a mal oldunuz! Kutsal Terra aşkına... Babamın o alt tabaka sonradan görmeyi sadece fark etmesini değil, aynı zamanda ciddiye almaya başlamasını sağlamak için neler gerektiğini biliyor musunuz?"
languages.original_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

traits.locale_text: "Bize İsimond'a mal oldunuz! Kutsal Terra aşkına... Babamın o alt tabaka sonradan görmeyi sadece fark etmesini değil, aynı zamanda ciddiye almaya başlamasını sağlamak için neler gerektiğini biliyor musunuz?"

languages.text: «¡Nos ha costado a Isimond! ¡Sagrada Terra, ¿tiene la menor idea de lo que me costó que mi padre no solo se fijara en ese plebeyo advenedizo, sino que empezara a tomarse su consejo en serio?!».
languages.original_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Nos ha costado a Isimond! ¡Sagrada Terra, ¿tiene la menor idea de lo que me costó que mi padre no solo se fijara en ese plebeyo advenedizo, sino que empezara a tomarse su consejo en serio?!».

languages.text: "Ihr habt uns Isimond gekostet. Heiliges Terra, habt Ihr auch nur die leiseste Ahnung, was nötig war, damit mein Vater diesen Emporkömmling nicht nur zur Kenntnis, sondern auch ernst nimmt?"
languages.original_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt uns Isimond gekostet. Heiliges Terra, habt Ihr auch nur die leiseste Ahnung, was nötig war, damit mein Vater diesen Emporkömmling nicht nur zur Kenntnis, sondern auch ernst nimmt?"

languages.text: 「イシモンドを奪われたのはお前だ！聖テラ、お前には、父がその下級の野郎に気づき、さらに彼を真剣に扱うようになったために、どれだけの努力を払ったのか、少しでもわかるか？」
languages.original_text: "You have cost us Isimond! Holy Terra, do you have the faintest idea what it took to get my father not only to notice that low-born upstart, but to begin taking him seriously?"

traits.locale_text: 「イシモンドを奪われたのはお前だ！聖テラ、お前には、父がその下級の野郎に気づき、さらに彼を真剣に扱うようになったために、どれだけの努力を払ったのか、少しでもわかるか？」
